description_long: This awning features a prominent red-and-white striped fabric canopy, providing shade over a small outdoor seating area with tables and chairs. The canopy is supported by slender vertical metal poles at the front and is attached to a wooden structure with a corrugated metal roof at the rear. The wooden structure has a natural, weathered finish, and the corrugated roof adds a utilitarian touch. The canopy's edge is scalloped, giving it a decorative and inviting appearance. The seating area beneath the awning consists of simple, modern tables and chairs, suggesting a casual dining or resting spot. No branding or signage is visible on the awning or its trim.
description: A red-and-white striped awning with a scalloped edge, supported by metal poles and attached to a wooden structure with a corrugated metal roof, shading a small outdoor seating area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped canopy, scalloped edge, and the seating area beneath the awning.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the corrugated metal roof, wooden structure, and the extension of the canopy over the tables and chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden wall and the full width of the corrugated metal roof, with the canopy visible above.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the relationship between the canopy, support poles, and the seating area.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to the front facade of a wooden structure with a corrugated metal roof
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with vertical metal support poles
